title: The Hot Weather Fiend.
content:
Ah, somewhere in another world
        There is a warmer spot,
     Where the fire is burning always.
        And always it is hot;
     And always fiends are shouting,
        And always flames are blue,
     And always Satan's asking:
        "IS IT HOT ENOUGH FOR YOU?"
meaning:
Edwin C. Ranck's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Hot Weather Fiend."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
